# Sun

## Tags
brightness, weather, light, summer

## Categories
accessibility, weather, seasons, sustainability

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/sun)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Sun;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Sun { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
